heading: WE BUILD WEBSITES THAT WIN BUSINESS
text: Apex Digital creates high-performance websites, SEO strategies, and brand identities that help businesses grow online. Fast, responsive, and built to convert.

items.title: Web Design and Development
items.text: We build fast, responsive websites that look great on every device. From simple landing pages to full CMS-powered sites, we deliver designs that convert visitors into customers.

items.title: Search Engine Optimization
items.text: Rank higher and get found by the right customers. Our SEO service covers technical audits, on-page optimization, content strategy, and local SEO to help you outrank the competition.

items.title: Brand Identity and Strategy
items.text: Your brand is your first impression. We develop complete brand identities — logo, colors, typography, and guidelines — that communicate who you are and what makes you different.

items.name: Sarah M.
items.quote: Working with Apex Digital completely transformed our online presence. Our organic traffic tripled within 4 months of launch.

items.name: James T.
items.quote: The team delivered an outstanding website on time and on budget. Communication was excellent throughout the entire project.

items.name: Lisa R.
items.quote: Our new brand identity is exactly what we needed. Professional, modern, and immediately recognizable. Highly recommend.

heading: Ready to Grow Your Business Online?
text: Let us talk about your project. We offer a free 30-minute strategy call — no commitment required.

items.question: How long does a website project take?
items.answer: Most business websites take 4 to 8 weeks from kickoff to launch. The timeline depends on the scope, number of pages, and how quickly feedback is provided. We will give you a detailed project plan at the start of every engagement.

items.question: Do you work with small businesses?
items.answer: Absolutely. Most of our clients are small and mid-size businesses. We have service packages designed for businesses at every stage — from brand-new startups to established companies looking to refresh their digital presence.

items.question: Will I be able to update the website myself?
items.answer: Yes. We build all our websites on a CMS so you can update content, add blog posts, and make changes without any coding knowledge. We also provide a training session and documentation after launch.
